⚠️ **This type is _unstable_ and may change significantly in a way that the data won't be backwards compatible.**
A view for displaying status transitions over time, for use with [`archetypes.Status`](https://rerun.io/docs/reference/types/archetypes/status?speculative-link).

 * 🐍 [Python API docs for `StatusView`](https://ref.rerun.io/docs/python/stable/common/blueprint_views?speculative-link#rerun.blueprint.views.StatusView)
